description_long: This object is a modern, stylized chessboard with a distinctive geometric design. The board itself features a classic 8x8 grid of alternating light and dark squares, rendered in a wood-like material. The chess pieces are abstract, with angular, faceted forms and cut-out details, each piece differentiated by unique silhouettes and heights. The pieces are divided into two color groups: a lighter, natural wood tone and a darker, stained wood tone. The border of the board is minimal, blending seamlessly with the grid and providing a clean, contemporary look. The overall aesthetic is both functional and decorative, making it suitable for display in urban parks, plazas, or community spaces.
description: A modern, geometric chessboard with abstract, angular wooden pieces in light and dark tones, set on a classic 8x8 checkered grid. The design is sleek and minimal, with a seamless border and visually striking silhouettes.
description_view_0: Front view showing all chess pieces arranged in starting positions, highlighting the unique angular designs and contrasting colors.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the board and the profile of the pieces, with the checkered grid visible between the two sets of pieces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposing set of chess pieces, mirroring the front but with reversed color dominance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the board's depth and the arrangement of the pieces from the other side.
attribute_board_pattern: The board features a classic 8x8 grid of perfectly square tiles, alternating between light and dark wood tones. The squares are sharply defined, with no additional ornamentation or decorative inlays, giving the board a clean and modern appearance.
attribute_border_design: The border is minimal and flush with the playing surface, matching the light wood tone of the board. It is narrow, with no visible ornamentation, inscriptions, or markings, emphasizing a sleek and contemporary style.
